data.biography: 黄婷婷，1992年9月8日出生于江苏省南京市，中国内地流行乐女歌手、影视演员。前女子偶像团体SNH48成员。2023年6月29日，黄婷婷在其社交账号上发文宣布与丝芭文化正式解约。

data.biography:
Taylour Dominique Paige-Angulo (born October 5, 1990) is an American actress and dancer. She is best known for her role as Ahsha Hayes in the VH1 sports drama series Hit the Floor, and has gained recognition for her performances in the films Jean of the Joneses (2016), White Boy Rick (2018), Ma Rainey's Black Bottom (2020), Boogie (2021), and Zola (2020). Her performance in the latter film won her the Independent Spirit Award for Best Female Lead.

In 2022, Paige ventured into music, collaborating with Kendrick Lamar on the song "We Cry Together", which reached the top twenty on the Billboard Hot 100 and earned her a Grammy Award nomination.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Taylour Paige, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Taylour Paige

data.biography:
Taylour Paige, née le 5 octobre 1990 à Santa Monica en Californie, est une danseuse et actrice américaine.

Elle débute comme danseuse et se produit dans des comédies musicales avant de se faire connaître par le rôle d'Ahsha Hayes dans la série télévisée Hit the Floor (2013-2016).

Monica Maria Raymund (born July 26, 1986) is an American actress, director and producer. She is known for her roles as Jackie Quiñones on the Starz crime drama Hightown, Gabriela Dawson on the NBC drama Chicago Fire, Dana Lodge on the CBS legal drama The Good Wife, and Maria 'Ria' Torres on the Fox crime drama Lie to Me. She graduated from Juilliard in New York City.

The character of Antonio Dawson (Jon Seda) on Chicago PD is sibling to her character of Gabriela Dawson on Chicago Fire.
data.name: Monica Raymund

data.biography:
包涵，2002年10月28日出生于吉林省，中国内地男演员，浩瀚影视签约艺人，《青春有你第三季》训练生。

2021年2月18日，参与录制的男团成长综艺节目《青春有你第三季》在爱奇艺播出。2022年12月19日，主演的网剧《大码皇后要翻天》在腾讯视频播出。2023年4月20日，主演的网剧《替嫁新娘》在优酷播出。2025年5月30日，参演的电视剧《千秋赋》播出。
data.name: 包涵

data.biography:
包涵，2002 年 10 月 28 日出生於吉林省，中國內地男演員，浩瀚影視簽約藝人，《青春有你第三季》訓練生。

2021 年 2 月 18 日，參與錄製的男團成長綜藝節目《青春有你第三季》在愛奇藝播出。2022 年 12 月 19 日，主演的網劇《大碼皇后要翻天》在騰訊視頻播出。2023 年 4 月 20 日，主演的網劇《替嫁新娘》在優酷播出。2025 年 5 月 30 日，參演的電視劇《千秋賦》播出。
data.name: 包涵

data.biography:
Kaspar Velberg (born January 29, 1989) is an Estonian actor.

In 2012, he graduated from the stage art school of the Estonian Academy of Music and Theater as an actor. Then he worked as an actor in the Tallinn City Theater.

data.name: カスパール・フェルベルク

data.biography:
Kaspar Velberg, 29 Ocak 1989 tarihinde Estonya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Estonya sinemasının ve tiyatrosunun yeni nesil yetenekli oyuncularından biri olarak kabul edilen Velberg, oyunculuk eğitimini prestijli Estonya Müzik ve Tiyatro Akademisi'nin (EMTA) Sahne Sanatları Okulu'nda tamamlamış ve 2012 yılında mezun olmuştur. Mezuniyetinin hemen ardından ülkenin en saygın tiyatrolarından biri olan Tallinn Şehir Tiyatrosu (Tallinna Linnateater) kadrosuna katılmış ve burada sergilediği performanslarla sağlam bir sahne kariyeri inşa etmiştir.

Velberg'in sinema dünyasında uluslararası alanda tanınmasını sağlayan ve kariyerinin dönüm noktası olan yapım, Elmo Nüganen'in yönettiği 2015 yapımı savaş draması "1944" olmuştur. Estonya tarihinin en yüksek gişe hasılatlarından birine ulaşan ve ülkenin Oscar adayı olan bu filmde, İkinci Dünya Savaşı sırasında Sovyet ordusu saflarında savaşmak zorunda kalan Estonyalı asker Karl Tammik karakterine hayat vermiştir. Filmin ikinci yarısının ana kahramanı olan Velberg, savaşın trajedisini, kardeşin kardeşe kırdırıldığı bir dönemin duygusal yükünü ve kişisel ikilemleri başarıyla yansıtarak eleştirmenlerden ve izleyicilerden büyük övgü almıştır.

Televizyon dünyasında da etkili işlere imza atan oyuncu, özellikle 2018 yapımı "Pank" (The Bank) adlı drama dizisindeki performansıyla dikkat çekmiştir. 1990'ların çalkantılı Estonya'sında geçen ve gerçek olaylardan esinlenen bu dizi, Velberg'in dramatik derinliğini sergilemesine olanak tanımıştır. Ayrıca Estonya edebiyatının en önemli eserinden uyarlanan ve gişe rekorları kıran "Tõde ja õigus" (Truth and Justice) (2019) filminde ve casusluk gerilimi "O2" (2020) gibi dönem filmlerinde yer alarak filmografisini zenginleştirmiştir. Kaspar Velberg, hem tiyatro sahnesindeki disiplini hem de beyaz perdedeki karizmatik ve doğal oyunculuğuyla Estonya'nın önde gelen aktörleri arasında kariyerine devam etmektedir.
Angela Paula Stander is known for Poor Things (2023).
data.name: Angela Paula Stander

data.biography: Yu Nan (born 5 September 1978) is a Chinese actress. Born in Dalian, Yu Nan studied at the Beijing Film Academy, where she graduated in 1999.
data.name: Yu Nan

data.biography: 余男（1978年9月5日－），中国电影女演员。北京电影学院表演系毕业。余男自2000年主演电影《月蚀》后，就展现其精湛演技。尤其在《惊蛰》一片中的表现，为她囊括该年度中国境内几乎所有重要的奖项，并且主演的《图雅的婚事》夺得了金熊奖。由于其英、法语皆流利，更将演艺版图拓展至欧美大陆，曾参与了法国电影《狂怒》(Fureur)、好莱坞动作片《权杖》(Diamond Dogs)、《骇速快手》(Speed Racer)等片的演出。
data.name: 余男

data.biography: 余男（1978 年 9 月 5 日－），中國電影女演員。北京電影學院表演系畢業。余男自 2000 年主演電影《月蝕》後，就展現其精湛演技。尤其在《驚蟄》一片中的表現，為她囊括該年度中國境內幾乎所有重要的獎項，並且主演的《圖雅的婚事》奪得了金熊獎。由於其英、法語皆流利，更將演藝版圖拓展至歐美大陸，曾參與了法國電影《戰逆豪情》(Fureur)、好萊塢動作片《權杖》(Diamond Dogs)、《駭速快手》(Speed Racer) 等片的演出。
data.name: 余男

data.biography: Daisuke Namikawa is a Japanese actor, voice actor and singer. He is sometimes mistaken for fellow voice actor Daisuke Hirakawa, as their names only differ by one character when written in kanji. Despite his wide range of voice casting, he is usually cast as young, kind heroes.
data.name: Daisuke Namikawa

data.biography: 浪川大辅是日本男性配音员。东京都出身。身高173cm、血型B型。户口登记生日为1976年4月2日，实际上的生日是3月29日。
data.name: 浪川大辅

data.biography: 浪川大輔是日本的男性聲優。出身於東京都，所屬公司為 Stay Luck。
data.name: 浪川大輔

data.biography:
Daisuke Namikawa (浪川 大輔, Namikawa Daisuke, nacido el 2 de abril de 1976) es un seiyū (actor de doblaje), actor y cantante japonés de Tokio. Director ejecutivo de Stay Luck. A pesar de su amplia gama de voces, generalmente se le presenta como héroes jóvenes y amables.

Tras su buena actuación doblando a Elliot, el personaje principal de E.T., recibió más ofertas para continuar trabajando doblando películas. Apareció en una serie de películas populares como La historia interminable y Los Goonies. Desde entonces, ha participado en la industria doblando otras películas populares extranjeras, así como anime. Perteneció a varias agencias: Komadori, Haikyō y Across Entertainment, hasta que decidió formar su propia agencia Stay Luck.
data.name: Daisuke Namikawa

data.biography: 浪川大輔是日本男性聲優。東京都出身。
data.name: 浪川大輔

data.biography: Daisuke Namikawa è un attore, doppiatore e cantante giapponese. Viene talvolta confuso per il suo collega doppiatore Daisuke Hirakawa, dato che i loro nomi differiscono solo per un carattere quando scritti in kanji. Nonostante la sua ampia gamma di voci, di solito viene scelto per interpretare eroi giovani e gentili.
data.name: Daisuke Namikawa

data.name: 玛德琳·克莱因

data.biography: هي ممثلة أمريكية. مواليد 21 ديسمبر 1997 في تشارلستون ، ساوث كاروليناالولايات المتحدة وهي معروفة بدور سارة كاميرون في مسلسل الدراما على منصة نتفليكس ضفاف كارولينا . نشأت كلاين في غوس كريك ، ساوث كارولينا ، بالقرب من تشارلستون . لوالده ، وهو وكيل عقارات ، ومهندس مارك كلاين.هي صغيرة ، أمضت الصيف في مدينة نيويورك تعمل على الإعلانات التلفزيونية ، بعضها كان لصالح T-Mobile و Sunny D. بعد تخرجها من مدرسة تشارلستون داي ، التحقت بجامعة كوستال كارولينا ، لكنها تركت الدراسة عندما كانت في التاسعة عشرة من عمرها لمتابعة التمثيل سرعان ما بدأت بأدوار صغيرة مثل كلوي في Boy Erased دور سارة كاميرون في مسلسل Outer Banks عام 2020.
data.name: مادلين كلاين

data.biography: Madelyn Renee Cline (Goose Creek, 21 de diciembre de 1997) es una actriz estadounidense, conocida principalmente por su papel como Sarah Cameron en la serie de Netflix Outer Banks, además de por su papel como Whiskey en la película "Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery", también de Netflix.

Η Μάντελιν Κλάιν (Madelyn Cline) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός και μοντέλο. Είναι περισσότερο γνωστή για τους ρόλους της ως Sarah Cameron στην εφηβική δραματική σειρά Outer Banks του Netflix και ως Whisky στην ταινία μυστηρίου του Rian Johnson Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery.
data.name: Μάντελιν Κλάιν

data.biography:
💥Мэдлин Рене Клайн. Родилась в 1997-ом году в Чарлстоне, Южная Каролина, США. Была единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал инженером, а мать была агентом по недвижимости. Училась в Университете прибрежной Каролины. Работает актрисой и моделью. Личную жизнь предпочитает держать в тайне

🏆Главные награды🏆: MTV Movie & TV Awards (2021) [Внешние отмели]

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Мэдлин в подростковом возрасте подрабатывала моделью и снималась в рекламе крупных брендов

data.biography:
Born in The Bronx, New York, Buono was raised in a blue-collar family and decided at an early age to make acting her life's ambition. At 11, she showed her connection to her family's work ethic by answering a casting call ad for Harvey Fierstein's "Spookhouse" and landing the role, without any assistance from her family or other adults. Buono began landing roles on television and the New York stage while in her teens and early twenties, and earned a Daytime Emmy nomination as a young victim of sexual abuse in Abby, My Love (1991) (CBS, 1991), which aired as part of the CBS Schoolbreak Special (1984). She soon graduated to minor roles in Stephen Gyllenhaal's Waterland (1992), with Jeremy Irons and Ethan Hawke; as an illegal immigrant in The Cowboy Way (1994), with Woody Harrelson and Kiefer Sutherland; and in Noah Baumbach's much-loved indie comedy, Kicking and Screaming (1995), which reunited her with her "Abby, My Love" co-star, Josh Hamilton. While cultivating her acting career, Buono also graduated from Columbia University with a double major in English and political science in 1995, which she earned in just three years.

After graduation, Buono concentrated largely on character roles in independent films and on television. She was the wife and confidante of prison guard Robert Sean Leonard, who served as an earpiece for monstrous 1930s criminal Carl Panzram (James Woods) in Killer: A Journal of Murder (1995), before playing an accident-prone opera singer in love with a young man (Gibson Frazier) with Jazz-Era affectations in the offbeat Man of the Century (1999). She soon added behind-the-camera credits to her expanding resume, including writer/director on the short, Baggage (1997), with Liev Schreiber and Minnie Driver, and served as co-producer and star of the comedy, Two Ninas (1999), about a pair of similarly monikered women (Buono and Amanda Peet) who fell for a very unlucky man. She continues to write and co-wrote "When the Cat's Away" (1999), with Brad Anderson, and wrote an adaptation of F. Scott Fitzgerald's first novel, "This Side of Paradise".

Buono's screen credits grew more obscure at the launch of the new millennium - art house and film festival circles saw the lesbian drama, Chutney Popcorn (1999), Attention Shoppers (2000), Happy Accidents (2000) with Marisa Tomei and Vincent D'Onofrio. She soon turned to television for wider exposure, and earned it through supporting roles on high profile series like Third Watch (1999) and The Sopranos (1999). In 2007, she joined the cast of the cult favorite, The Dead Zone (2002) (USA, 2002-2007) as Sheriff Anna Turner, who investigated the death of her predecessor (Chris Bruno).

During this period, Buono maintained her screen career in features as varied as Ang Lee's Hulk (2003), playing David Banner's mother, who was killed by his genetically-induced rage, and Beer League (2006), and Artie Lange's hapless lay-about love interest. In 2010, she appeared as the divorced mother of Kodi Smit-McPhee in Let Me In (2010), the critically-praised American remake of the Swedish vampire movie, Let the Right One In (2008). That same year, she landed her most widely seen role-to-date on Mad Men (2007), playing Dr. Faye Miller. For her efforts, Buono received an Emmy Award nomination for Outstanding Guest Actress in a Drama Series in 2011.
data.name: Cara Buono

data.biography: Cara Buono ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin. Ihr Filmdebüt gab sie in „Gladiator“ (1992). Bekannt wurde sie durch ihre Rollen in verschiedenen Fernsehserien, darunter „CBS Schoolbreak Special“ (1991), „Law & Order“ (1996–2024) und „Mad Men“ (2010). Sie spielte die Hauptrolle der Karen Wheeler in der Netflix-Serie „Stranger Things“ (2016–2025). Für ihre Darstellungen wurde sie sowohl für einen Primetime Emmy Award als auch für einen Daytime Emmy Award als Beste Gastdarstellerin in einer Dramaserie nominiert. Zu ihren bekanntesten Filmen zählen „Hulk (2003), in dem sie Edith Banner verkörperte, die englischsprachige Neuverfilmung von „So finster die Nacht“, „Let Me In“ (2010), „A Good Marriage“ (2014) nach einer Geschichte von Stephen King, „Margos Spuren“ (2015), „All Saints“ (2017), „Monsters and Men“ (2018) und „She Came from the Woods“ (2022).

Cara Buono（1971 年 3 月 1 日出生）是一位美国女演员、编剧和导演，因在 AMC 电视剧《广告狂人》第四季中饰演 Faye Miller 博士、在《黑道家族》第六季中饰演 Kelli Moltisanti、在 2006 年喜剧《Artie Lange's Beer League》中饰演 Linda Salvo，在 2016 年恐怖科幻 Netflix 原创剧集《怪奇物语》中饰演 Karen Wheeler。她曾出演过《绿巨人》（2003 年）和《让我进来》（2010 年）等电影。
data.name: 卡拉·布欧诺

data.biography:
Cara Buono (родилась 1 марта 1971 года) — американская актриса, сценарист и режиссёр, наиболее известная по ролям доктора Фэй Миллер в четвёртом сезоне драматического сериала AMC «Безумцы», Келли Молтисанти в шестом сезоне «Клана Сопрано», Линды Сальво в комедии 2006 года «Пивная лига Арти Лэнга» и Карен Уилер в научно-фантастическом сериале Netflix 2016 года «Очень странные дела». Она снялась в таких фильмах, как «Халк» (2003) и «Впусти меня» (2010).

Описание выше из статьи Википедии Cara Buono, лицензированной по лицензии CC-BY-SA, полный список участников в Википедии.
data.name: Кара Буоно

data.biography: 卡拉·布歐諾（1971 年 3 月 1 日出生）是一位美國女演員、編劇和導演，因在 AMC 電視劇《廣告狂人》第四季中飾演 Faye Miller 博士、在《黑道家族》第六季中飾演 Kelli Moltisanti、在 2006 年喜劇《Artie Lange's Beer League》中飾演 Linda Salvo，在 2016 年恐怖科幻 Netflix 原創劇集《怪奇物語》中飾演 Karen Wheeler。她曾出演過《綠巨人》（2003 年）和《讓我進來》（2010 年）等電影。
data.name: 卡拉·布歐諾

data.biography: Minami Hamabe (born August 29, 2000) is a Japanese actress. She is one of Japan's most prominent figures in the modern-day entertainment industry. Hamabe gained widespread fame for her role in Japan for her role in the live-action film Let Me Eat Your Pancreas (2017). She gained more of a worldwide fame with her role and performance in Takashi Yamazaki's Godzilla Minus One (2023).
data.name: Minami Hamabe

data.biography:
滨边美波（はまべ みなみ、Hamabe Minami），2000年8月29日出生于石川县，日本演员，隶属于东宝艺能事务所 。

2011年，获得第七届东宝灰姑娘大赛新生代奖  ；同年主演了短篇电影《空色物语》。2015年9月，主演了漫改SP特别剧《我们仍未知道那天所看见的花的名字》，饰演长大后的“本间芽衣子” ；同年，凭借出演悬疑日剧《无痛~诊断之眼~》获得了第2届电视剧信心奖最佳新人奖。2016年，主演漫改日剧《天才麻将少女》 。2017年，主演青春片《我想吃掉你的胰脏》，凭借该片获得第42届报知电影奖新人奖。
data.name: 滨边美波

data.biography: 濱邊美波（日語：浜辺美波，2000年8月29日－）是日本女演員，出身自石川縣，隸屬於東寶藝能旗下。
data.name: 濱邊美波

data.biography: Minami Hamabe (nascida em 29 de agosto de 2000) é uma atriz japonesa. Ela é uma das figuras mais proeminentes do Japão na indústria do entretenimento moderna. Hamabe ganhou fama generalizada por seu papel no Japão por seu papel no filme live-action Let Me Eat Your Pancreas (2017). Ela ganhou mais fama mundial com seu papel e atuação em Godzilla Minus One, de Takashi Yamazaki.
data.name: Minami Hamabe
มินามิ ฮามาเบะ

data.biography: Minami Hamabe (* 29. August 2000) ist eine japanische Schauspielerin. Sie ist eine der prominentesten Persönlichkeiten Japans in der modernen Unterhaltungsindustrie. Große Bekanntheit erlangte Hamabe in Japan durch ihre Rolle im Live-Action-Film „Let Me Eat Your Pancreas“ (2017). Mit ihrer Rolle und ihrem Auftritt in Takashi Yamazakis Godzilla Minus One (2023) erlangte sie weltweite Bekanntheit.
data.name: Minami Hamabe

data.biography: Emma Laird (born September 8, 1998) is a Scottish-born English actress. On television, she is known for her role in the Paramount+ series Mayor of Kingstown (since 2021). Her films include A Haunting in Venice (2023), The Brutalist (2024) and Satisfaction (2025).
data.name: Emma Laird

data.biography:
Британская актриса, модель.

Родилась 8 сентября 1998 года в Честерфилде (графство Дербишир, Англия, Великобритания). Окончила среднюю школу Tupton Hall School в Честерфилде (2014).

С 2016 года работала моделью. В 2019 году была лицом ювелирной компании Pandora. Изучала актерское мастерство в Нью-Йоркской киноакадемии. Вернувшись в Британию снялась в короткометражных фильмах «Из жизни» (2018) и «В разговоре с богиней» (2019).

Наиболее известная роль танцовщица Айрис в криминальном телесериале «Мэр Кингстауна» (2021-2023).
data.name: Эмма Лэйрд

data.biography: 艾玛·莱尔德（Emma Laird）是英国女演员。
data.name: 艾玛·莱尔德

data.biography:
Emma Laird est une actrice écossaise née le 8 septembre 1998. Elle a commencé sa carrière comme mannequin à l'âge de 18 ans après avoir été repérée au Leeds festival. Après sept ans dans l'industrie du mannequinat, elle a décidé de se consacrer à la comédie, suivant des cours à la New York film academy.

Son premier rôle majeur à la télévision est celui d'Iris dans la série "Mayor of Kingstown" en 2021. Cette performance lui a valu d'être nommée parmi les "10 britanniques à surveiller" par Variety la même année.

En 2023, Laird a joué dans la série "The crowded room" et a fait ses débuts au cinéma dans "A haunting in Venice" de Kenneth Branagh. Elle a également un rôle dans le film "The brutalist" (2024) de Brady Corbet.

Parmi ses projets à venir, on peut citer "Fackham Hall", actuellement en production et 4 films indépendants prévus pour fin 2025 et début 2026.

Laird travaille avec son coach James Monarski avec d'améliorer son jeu d'actrice.
艾瑪·萊爾德（Emma Laird）是英國女演員。
data.name: 艾瑪·萊爾德
Taylor Swift: Chương Kết của một Kỷ Nguyên
data.overview: The End of an Era do Don Argott thực hiện, mang đến cái nhìn về cuộc sống của Taylor Swift trong suốt quá trình lưu diễn kéo dài gần hai năm. Bộ phim ghi lại câu chuyện hậu trường, những lần ca sĩ tập luyện cùng ban nhạc, quy mô sân khấu. Ba mẹ Taylor, bạn trai Travis Kelce cùng các ca sĩ Gracie Abrams, Sabrina Carpenter, Ed Sheeran và Florence Welch cũng góp mặt trong tác phẩm.

cast.name: Kayla LaVine
cast.character: Girl in Flower Dress at Wedding Scene (uncredited)

data.biography: Fabian Loo (born 9 October 1990) is a Malaysian actor. Starting his career as a theatre actor, he went on to pursue an acting career in television and film, best known for his roles in the films Think Big Big and Fly By Night, but better known for his portrayal of Ash in One Cent Thief. He is the younger brother of singer and actor, Cedric Loo.
data.name: Fabian Loo
